task_completion.description: The agent initiates the process to edit the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the agent clicking an 'Edit', 'Update', or pencil icon on the patient dashboard, or the patient edit form is actively displayed.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to the contact information section of the patient edit interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Contact Info', 'Demographics', or similar tab/section is active and visible within the edit interface, showing fields for phone numbers or addresses.

task_completion.description: The agent inputs the target phone number into the appropriate field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text '555-867-5309' (or '5558675309') is typed into a text input field labeled 'Telephone Number', 'Phone', or similar.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the updated patient record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent's cursor is clicking a 'Save', 'Save Changes', or 'Update' button, or a success toast/notification is visible indicating the patient record was successfully updated.

task_completion.description: The updated phone number is visible on the main patient dashboard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main patient dashboard is displayed (the agent has exited edit mode) and the phone number '555-867-5309' (or '5558675309') is clearly visible in the patient's demographic or contact summary section.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenMRS web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser navigating the OpenMRS 3.x UI. There should be no terminal windows executing curl commands or database queries to update the record.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to modify the page DOM to display the phone number.

integrity.description: The agent completed the application's save flow rather than just typing the number and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a clear transition from the edit screen with the typed number to the dashboard screen showing the saved number, indicating the save action was actually processed by the application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target phone number is '555-867-5309' (it may also be formatted as '5558675309'). In OpenMRS, this value is stored and displayed under the attribute type 'Telephone Number'.
